title: PDF to Podcast
summary: Convert PDF documents to podcast audio using AI. A full-stack application with FastAPI backend and Next.js frontend for transforming documents into listenable content.

title: Déjà Claude
summary: A VS Code extension to browse, search, and revisit your Claude Code chat history with fuzzy search, pinning, tagging, and markdown export capabilities.

title: Z.ai Usage Tracker
summary: A Visual Studio Code extension that displays your Z.ai API usage directly in the status bar with color-coded indicators, detailed tooltips, and real-time quota tracking.

title: AI Tutor
summary: An AI-powered educational platform providing personalized learning experiences using RAG, function calling, and modern web technologies. Features adaptive learning paths and real-time feedback.

title: PITS - Personalized Intelligent Tutoring System
summary: An AI-powered tutoring system that creates customized learning experiences by processing uploaded documents and generating structured courses with slides, narration, and an interactive chatbot.

title: Smart Job Application Tracker
summary: An intelligent job application tracking system that automatically monitors email for job-related communications and extracts application details using AI.

title: Repo Flattener
summary: A Python package to convert repositories into flattened files for easier uploading to Large Language Models (LLMs).

title: Sentiment Analysis using BERT
summary: This project aims to perform sentiment analysis using the BERT model and Transformers by Hugging Face.

title: Fine Tuning LLM with LoRA and QLoRA
summary: A fine-tuning technique that allows you to fine-tune and train model much more efficiently than normal training

title: Portfolio Website
summary: A personal portfolio website to showcase projects and skills.
